name: aws boundary: normalizes an injected WA Tool response into the plugin-standard schema
command:
cat > h.json <<'JEOF'
{"platform":"aws","route":"aws-boundary","selected_option":{"option_id":"opt-balanced","summary":"Balanced","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest","multi_az"]},"iac_targets":["terraform"],"build_units":["encryption_at_rest","multi_az"]}
JEOF
cat > native.json <<'JEOF'
{"review_ref":"native-review/wl-1","recommendations":[{"id":"SEC-1","title":"Enable encryption at rest","pillar":"security","severity":"HIGH"},{"id":"REL-2","title":"Use multi-AZ deployment","pillar":"reliability","severity":"MEDIUM"},{"id":"X-9","title":"Adopt a mesh fabric thing","pillar":"operational-excellence","severity":"LOW"}]}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/aws-boundary.sh" --handoff h.json --native-response native.json --out r.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("r.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.platform==="aws"&&j.source_api==="aws-well-architected-tool"&&Array.isArray(j.normalized.recommendations)&&j.normalized.recommendations.length===3?0:1)' && echo normalized 1>&2
